query: SELECT ps.id, ps.protocolId, ps.sortOrder, ps.title, ps.frequency, p.name as protocolName FROM protocol_steps ps JOIN protocols p ON p.id = ps.protocolId ORDER BY ps.protocolId, ps.sortOrder;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Loc9eiqTeCpHbm.bfc0203d8e87 --database 2VRczM8SEoMgkRv9pxV2Z3 --execute SELECT ps.id, ps.protocolId, ps.sortOrder, ps.title, ps.frequency, p.name as protocolName FROM protocol_steps ps JOIN protocols p ON p.id = ps.protocolId ORDER BY ps.protocolId, ps.sortOrder;
